headline: 2026年7月6日娱乐速递：多部新片热映
headlineEn: Entertainment Digest for July 6, 2026: New Films Trending
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周新片仅2部。热门趋势包括《痴迷》《鬼上车》《龙族》等，下周多部大片即将来袭。
summaryEn: No new releases today, only 2 this week. Top trends include 'Obsession', 'Ghost Ride', 'Dragon Clan', with major films coming next week.

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》本周持续热度
industryHighlights.en: Enola Holmes 3 remains hot this week

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》位列本周趋势
industryHighlights.en: The Devil Wears Prada 2 trends this week

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》与《海洋奇缘：启航》备受期待
industryHighlights.en: Toy Story 5 and Moana: Voyage highly anticipated

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等大片即将上映
industryHighlights.en: Spider-Man: Brand New Day and others coming soon
